name: industrial_action_readiness_gate
purpose: Separate draft generation from executable enterprise actions.

status_rules.ready_to_submit: Use only when required fields are complete and the action does not require regulated approval.
status_rules.needs_confirmation: Use when the action is safe but needs user confirmation of target, recipients, due time, attachment, or version.
status_rules.requires_authorization: Use for quality release, safety permit, customer commitment, official SOP publishing, or privileged system actions.
status_rules.blocked_missing_fields: Use when missing fields would make the action unsafe or misleading.
